extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked with 2km to go on Etna, teammate CHAVEZ Esteban won from breakaway in staged Mitchelton-Scott 1-2, Yates took pink jersey.
tactical_patterns: Mitchelton-Scott placed two riders in break (Chavez and Yates support Dennis), allowing late race GC attack with zero chasing burden.
Yates attacked at 2km despite teammate ahead, forcing rivals to gift him time gaps while chasing breakaway behind.
Dumoulin lost key domestique Ten Dam to crash mid-climb, exposing depth issues when isolated on decisive mountain stages.
Pinot collected bonus seconds at finish despite dropped position, showing sprinter's kick compensates climbing deficits on summit finishes.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: attacked with teammate ahead creating no-lose scenario, looked strongest GC rider throughout Etna ascent
rider_signals.CHAVEZ Esteban: positive: won from break while providing GC teamwork, proving mitchelton dual-threat capability on mountain stages
rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: negative: cracked before summit despite breakaway position, suggests time trial specialists vulnerable even in advantageous tactical positions
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: described as 'decidedly dodgy' throughout climb yet finished in group, raising questions about actual form versus positioning skill
rider_signals.TEN DAM Laurens: negative: crashed mid-climb leaving Dumoulin isolated, critical domestique loss at worst possible moment
